query:
SELECT id, username, name, role, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE id IN (16020692, 16020693, 16020694, 16020710) 
   OR username IN ('13900000200', '13900000602', '13900000989') 
   OR name LIKE '%测试合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%多城市合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%无城市合伙人%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT id, username, name, role, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE id IN (16020692, 16020693, 16020694, 16020710) 
   OR username IN ('13900000200', '13900000602', '13900000989') 
   OR name LIKE '%测试合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%多城市合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%无城市合伙人%';
